google_star_count.display: Show count + star rating in nav/hero. Never just stars without a count.

license_number_visible.display: Show in TrustBar and Footer. Format: License #{number}

gaf_certification.display: Badge in TrustBar and Footer. If no badge asset, show text 'GAF Certified Contractor'.
gaf_certification.appliesIf: brandDNA.trust_badges contains entry with type=gaf OR type=owens-corning OR type=certainteed

bbb_accreditation.display: Badge in Footer. If no asset, show 'BBB A+ Accredited'.

angi_award.display: Footer only. Show 'Angi Super Service Award {year}' if available.

google_guaranteed.display: TrustBar. 'Google Guaranteed' badge links to GBP.

insurance_certificate.display: 'Available on request' is enough. Do not show the actual certificate.
insurance_certificate.copy: Fully insured. Certificate available on request.

before_after_photos.display: Real job photos only. No stock images in gallery. Label every photo with service type and city.

named_team_members.display: First name + last name + role. Photo strongly preferred.

response_time_claim.display: Only state if you can actually honour it.
response_time_claim.suggested_copy: We respond to every estimate request the same day.

warranty_specifics.display: Name the warranty length and what it covers. 'Lifetime warranty on labour and materials' outperforms 'we stand behind our work'.
warranty_specifics.copy: Lifetime warranty on labour and materials.
